judge_scores.reasoning: The model incorrectly states there is no definitive information, when the ground truth clearly indicates he is out of the race due to missing the deadline, and it hedges by saying decisions depend on many factors.
The response incorrectly suggests that Tarcísio de Freitas may run for president in 2026, despite the fact that he has decided to run for reelection as governor and missed the federal deadline.
The response correctly avoids stating Tarcísio is running for president but fails to mention his reelection bid and missed federal deadline.
